codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly configures Google OAuth 2.0, adding user upsert behavior and assigning the VIEWER role by default. RBAC was correctly extended with SUPER_ADMIN and AUTHOR roles, complete with hierarchical role resolution in AuthGuard. The Next.js middleware correctly protects workspace /admin routes, and the RS256 JWT pair generation script is provided.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker had to manually start the API with test environment variables using `pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- nest start` for local verification, as there is no `api_start_test` script or equivalent in `.factory/services.yaml`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: `Set-Location "C:/_Local/_Web-Devlopment/_Templates/Rueda Gems/Emerald/apps/api"; pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.test -- nest start`.

summary: Feature fully implements auth/RBAC hardening, Google OAuth integration, Next.js middleware protection, and JWT RS256 transition, with appropriate unit and E2E test coverage.
